name: GetYourGuide — Full-Stack Engineer (Freelance)
description: GetYourGuide is a platform for tour guides, excursions, activities and tourist attractions. As a freelance full-stack engineer (October 2020 – January 2021), I worked on improving customer engagement: implementing a homemade solution to support recommendation email campaigns, collaborating with design and CRM teams, optimizing the codebase for maximum supportability on a Vue.js SSR project, and improving unit and end-to-end tests.
